chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No.619 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ D/O matter: For order on MA No.16418/2025. 26.12.2025 Mr. Manzoor Hussain Khoso, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Sharafuddin, A.P.G. -------------------------------------- Learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press listed application, as the matter has been amicably settled between the parties. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Farhan/PS
